paragraphs.zh: 我是袁修玮，北京理工大学车辆工程专业硕士在读，本科毕业于武汉理工大学车辆工程专业。研究与实践横跨深度学习算法、混合动力域控制策略、与智能网联汽车网络安全，擅长把前沿算法工程化、落地到真实车辆与控制器上。
paragraphs.en: I'm Yuan Xiuwei, an M.S. candidate in Vehicle Engineering at Beijing Institute of Technology, with a B.E. in Vehicle Engineering from Wuhan University of Technology. My work spans deep learning, hybrid-powertrain domain control, and connected-vehicle cybersecurity — turning cutting-edge algorithms into engineering that runs on real vehicles and controllers.

paragraphs.zh: 熟练使用 Python（深度学习 / 数据处理）与 C/C++（嵌入式开发），掌握 PyTorch、MATLAB/Simulink、CATIA、ANSYS、HackRF 等工具链。曾在中车工业研究院、经纬恒润从事智能算法研发，参与国家重点研发项目，并在多项竞赛中获奖。
paragraphs.en: Proficient in Python (deep learning / data processing) and C/C++ (embedded development), with a toolchain spanning PyTorch, MATLAB/Simulink, CATIA, ANSYS, and HackRF. I've worked on intelligent-algorithm R&D at CRRC and Hirain Technologies, contributed to a national key R&D programme, and won awards in several competitions.

value.zh: 电机控制算法 · 深度学习 · 域控制开发
value.en: Motor Control Algorithms · Deep Learning · Domain Control Development
